name: Apricot Mango Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups water (use water from rehydrating mangos)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine couscous, turbinado sugar, and water in a large bowl until it becomes the consistency of thick oatmeal.
2. Stir in vanilla extract and let cool. Spread mixture into a prepared springform pan.
3. Simmer about 3 cups water with chopped dried mangoes and unsulfured dried apricots.
4. Press all the water out of the softened fruit and reserve about 1/3 for topping. Puree the reserved fruit, apricot preserves, and enough liquid (mango water) to make a thick glaze.
5. Spoon the puree onto the couscous crust in spoonfuls and spread gently to form a smooth layer.
6. Spread the remaining fruit mixture over the top of the tofu layer.
7. Sprinkle with roasted pecan fragments.
8. Let set for at least two hours before slicing carefully.
